datasets.name: Food-101
datasets.role_explanation: The model updates itself using food images so it becomes more specialized at recognizing dishes.
datasets.local_protocol: Each local seed uses 6 classes, with 4 training and 4 evaluation images per class.

examples.label: hot and sour soup
examples.alt: A real Food-101 example labeled hot and sour soup

examples.label: bruschetta
examples.alt: A real Food-101 example labeled bruschetta

examples.label: donuts
examples.alt: A real Food-101 example labeled donuts

examples.label: crab cakes
examples.alt: A real Food-101 example labeled crab cakes

datasets.name: CIFAR-10
datasets.plain_name: tiny photographs of everyday objects and animals
datasets.role_explanation: The model never trains on these examples. They test whether learning food harms an older general object-recognition ability.
datasets.local_protocol: Each local seed evaluates the same type of 30-image retained probe.

examples.label: cat
examples.alt: A real CIFAR-10 example labeled cat

examples.label: ship
examples.alt: A real CIFAR-10 example labeled ship

examples.label: airplane
examples.alt: A real CIFAR-10 example labeled airplane

examples.label: frog
examples.alt: A real CIFAR-10 example labeled frog

datasets.name: EuroSAT
datasets.role_explanation: This second scenario asks the same model to specialize in overhead satellite imagery.
datasets.local_protocol: Each local seed uses 6 classes, with 4 training and 4 evaluation images per class.

examples.label: Herbaceous Vegetation
examples.alt: A real EuroSAT example labeled Herbaceous Vegetation

examples.label: Industrial Buildings
examples.alt: A real EuroSAT example labeled Industrial Buildings

examples.label: Annual Crop
examples.alt: A real EuroSAT example labeled Annual Crop

examples.label: Highway
examples.alt: A real EuroSAT example labeled Highway

datasets.name: CIFAR-100
datasets.plain_name: tiny photographs from many fine-grained categories
datasets.role_explanation: These images test whether satellite specialization disrupts a broader set of object categories.
datasets.local_protocol: Each local seed evaluates a 40-image retained probe.

examples.label: mountain
examples.alt: A real CIFAR-100 example labeled mountain

examples.label: forest
examples.alt: A real CIFAR-100 example labeled forest

examples.label: seal
examples.alt: A real CIFAR-100 example labeled seal

examples.label: mushroom
examples.alt: A real CIFAR-100 example labeled mushroom

datasets.name: Oxford-IIIT Pet
datasets.role_explanation: This third scenario specializes the model toward distinguishing visually similar cat and dog breeds.
datasets.local_protocol: Each local seed uses 6 breeds, with 3 training and 2 evaluation images per breed.

examples.label: staffordshire bull terrier
examples.alt: A real Oxford-IIIT Pet example labeled staffordshire bull terrier

examples.label: yorkshire terrier
examples.alt: A real Oxford-IIIT Pet example labeled yorkshire terrier

examples.label: bengal
examples.alt: A real Oxford-IIIT Pet example labeled bengal

examples.label: chihuahua
examples.alt: A real Oxford-IIIT Pet example labeled chihuahua

datasets.name: MNIST
datasets.plain_name: handwritten digits from zero through nine
datasets.role_explanation: Digits are visually very different from pets, making this a useful counterexample: retained performance improved even though representations moved.
datasets.local_protocol: Each local seed evaluates a 40-image retained probe.

examples.alt: A real MNIST example labeled 7

A real MNIST example labeled 0
